nasb.text: My son, if you have become surety for your neighbor, Have given a pledge for a stranger,

esv.text: My son, if you have put up security for your neighbor, have given your pledge for a stranger,

cnv.text: 我兒，如果你作朋友的保證人， 替外人擊掌擔保；

ccb.text: 孩子啊，你若为邻人作保， 为外人击掌立约；

csbs.text: 我儿啊，如果你为邻人作保， 为别人击掌起誓，
